messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Design a minimalist PowerPoint presentation for internal healthcare teams to summarize clinical trial updates, containing exactly 8 slides with a white and teal color palette. Save the file as "Clinical_Trial_Update.pptx". All content should be written in French using 4:3 Standard slide dimensions. Do not use any external APIs or web scraping; rely solely on locally generated placeholder data. When creating charts, you must use `XL_CHART_TYPE` (e.g., `XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE`) instead of importing or using `ChartType` from `pptx.enum.chart`. Before attempting to set the text of a slide's title shape, you must first verify that `slide.shapes.title is not None` and only then access `.text`. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. Code blocks must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text explanations must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


# ── Deck constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10.0)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Clinical_Trial_Update.pptx"

TEAL_PRIMARY = RGBColor(13, 148, 136)
TEAL_DARK = RGBColor(15, 118, 110)
TEAL_LIGHT = RGBColor(204, 251, 241)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
GRAY_TEXT = RGBColor(55, 65, 81)
GRAY_SUBTLE = RGBColor(107, 114, 128)
LIGHT_GRAY_BG = RGBColor(243, 244, 246)

FONT_TITLE = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
FONT_SIZE_TITLE = 32
FONT_SIZE_SUBTITLE = 18
FONT_SIZE_HEADING = 20
FONT_SIZE_BODY = 14
FONT_SIZE_SMALL = 11


# ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color):
    """Fill the slide background with a solid color."""
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    """Add a text box with the given properties."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    else:
        run.font.color.rgb = GRAY_TEXT
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title_text=None, body_text=None):
    """Add a styled card (rounded rectangle) with optional title and body."""
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = WHITE
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(209, 213, 219)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    if title_text:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.25), top + Inches(0.2), width - Inches(0.5), Inches(0.4),
                     title_text, font_size=FONT_SIZE_HEADING, bold=True, color=TEAL_DARK)

    if body_text:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.25), top + Inches(0.65), width - Inches(0.5), height - Inches(0.85),
                     body_text, font_size=FONT_SIZE_BODY, color=GRAY_TEXT)

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, y_position):
    """Add a teal section label bar with white text."""
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.6), y_position, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = TEAL_PRIMARY
    bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), y_position + Inches(0.02), Inches(1.3), Inches(0.25),
                 text, font_size=FONT_SIZE_SMALL, bold=True, color=WHITE)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages=8):
    """Add a small footer with slide number."""
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(9.0), Inches(7.15), Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3),
                 f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=FONT_SIZE_SMALL, color=GRAY_SUBTLE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    """Insert an image if the file exists; otherwise draw a styled placeholder."""
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = TEAL_LIGHT
        shape.line.color.rgb = TEAL_PRIMARY
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(height.inches / 2 - 0.3), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.6),
                     "Image", font_size=FONT_SIZE_SMALL, color=TEAL_DARK, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_chart(slide, chart_type_enum, data_dict, left, top, width, height):
    """Add a chart using python-pptx with the given XL_CHART_TYPE enum."""
    chart_data = slide.shapes.add_chart(chart_type_enum, left, top, width, height, data_dict)
    return chart_data


# ── Slide builders ───────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_title(prs):
    """Slide 1 — Title slide."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(1.5), Inches(6.0), Inches(1.0),
                 "Mise à jour des essais cliniques", font_size=38, bold=True, color=TEAL_DARK, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Teal accent line
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(4.2), Inches(2.75), Inches(1.6), Inches(0.06))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = TEAL_PRIMARY
    line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(3.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(0.8),
                 "Résumé des données cliniques et prochaines étapes", font_size=18, color=GRAY_SUBTLE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(4.5), Inches(5.0), Inches(0.6),
                 "Département de recherche clinique — 2025", font_size=14, color=GRAY_SUBTLE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 1)


def slide_overview(prs):
    """Slide 2 — Overview of ongoing trials."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Aperçu des essais en cours"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.7),
                     "Aperçu des essais en cours", font_size=FONT_SIZE_TITLE, bold=True, color=TEAL_DARK)

    # Three trial cards
    card_width = Inches(2.8)
    card_height = Inches(3.5)
    y_start = Inches(1.4)

    trials = [
        ("Essai Phase I", "Évaluation de la sécurité\net de la tolérance du composé\nCT-2025-A\n\nParticipants : 48\nStatut : En cours"),
        ("Essai Phase II", "Évaluation préliminaire\nde l'efficacité et dosage optimal\n\nParticipants : 120\nStatut : Finalisation"),
        ("Essai Phase III", "Confirmation de l'efficacité\nà grande échelle\n\nParticipants : 600\nStatut : Planification")
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(trials):
        x = Inches(0.6 + i * 3.2)
        add_card(slide, x, y_start, card_width, card_height, title_text=title, body_text=body)

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def slide_enrollment(prs):
    """Slide 3 — Enrollment progress by site."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Progression de l'inscription"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.7),
                     "Progression de l'inscription", font_size=FONT_SIZE_TITLE, bold=True, color=TEAL_DARK)

    # Bar chart data
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ['Site A', 'Site B', 'Site C', 'Site D', 'Site E']
    chart_data.add_series('Patients inscrits', (32, 45, 28, 51, 37))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(0.6), Inches(1.3), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.0),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False

    # Summary stats cards on the right
    add_card(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.3), Inches(2.9), Inches(1.2),
             title_text="Total inscrit", body_text="193 patients")
    add_card(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(2.7), Inches(2.9), Inches(1.2),
             title_text="Objectif", body_text="200 patients")
    add_card(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(4.1), Inches(2.9), Inches(1.2),
             title_text="Taux d'adhésion", body_text="96,5 %")

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def slide_safety(prs):
    """Slide 4 — Safety data (adverse events)."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Données de sécurité"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.7),
                     "Données de sécurité", font_size=FONT_SIZE_TITLE, bold=True, color=TEAL_DARK)

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ['Léger', 'Modéré', 'Sévère']
    chart_data.add_series('Événements indésirables', (142, 38, 5))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE,
        Inches(0.6), Inches(1.3), Inches(4.5), Inches(4.5),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True

    # Key safety note card
    add_card(slide, Inches(5.5), Inches(1.3), Inches(3.9), Inches(2.0),
             title_text="Note de sécurité", body_text="Aucun effet indésirable grave\nnon attendu n'a été signalé.\nLe profil de tolérance reste favorable.")

    add_card(slide, Inches(5.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(3.9), Inches(2.0),
             title_text="Conclusion", body_text="Les données de sécurité sont conformes\naux critères d'arrêt prédéfinis.\nContinuation recommandée.")

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def slide_efficacy(prs):
    """Slide 5 — Efficacy results over time."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Résultats d'efficacité"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.7),
                     "Résultats d'efficacité", font_size=FONT_SIZE_TITLE, bold=True, color=TEAL_DARK)

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ['Mois 1', 'Mois 2', 'Mois 3', 'Mois 4', 'Mois 5', 'Mois 6']
    chart_data.add_series('Taux de réponse (%)', (18, 32, 47, 55, 63, 71))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS,
        Inches(0.6), Inches(1.3), Inches(8.8), Inches(4.0),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True

    # Key finding card
    add_card(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(5.7), Inches(5.0), Inches(1.3),
             title_text="Point clé", body_text="Taux de réponse global : 71 % à 6 mois\n(p < 0,001 vs contrôle)")

    add_footer(slide, 5)


def slide_timeline(prs):
    """Slide 6 — Milestone timeline."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Jalons du projet"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.7),
                     "Jalons du projet", font_size=FONT_SIZE_TITLE, bold=True, color=TEAL_DARK)

    milestones = [
        ("Jan 2024", "Lancement\nPhase I"),
        ("Juin 2024", "Inscription\ncomplète Phase I"),
        ("Sept 2024", "Début Phase II"),
        ("Mars 2025", "Analyse intermédiaire"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(1.8)
    card_h = Inches(2.2)
    y_pos = Inches(1.6)

    for i, (date, desc) in enumerate(milestones):
        x = Inches(0.5 + i * 2.3)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_w, card_h, title_text=date, body_text=desc)

        # Connector line between cards
        if i < len(milestones) - 1:
            connector = slide.shapes.add_shape(
                MSO_SHAPE.RIGHT_ARROW,
                Inches(0.5 + (i + 1) * 2.3 - 0.1), y_pos + Inches(1.0),
                Inches(0.4), Inches(0.15)
            )
            connector.fill.solid()
            connector.fill.fore_color.rgb = TEAL_PRIMARY
            connector.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, 6)


def slide_next_steps(prs):
    """Slide 7 — Next steps and action items."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Prochaines étapes"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.7),
                     "Prochaines étapes", font_size=FONT_SIZE_TITLE, bold=True, color=TEAL_DARK)

    steps = [
        ("1", "Finaliser l'analyse intermédiaire des données de sécurité"),
        ("2", "Soumettre le protocole Phase III au comité d'éthique"),
        ("3", "Recruter les 50 derniers patients pour la Phase II"),
        ("4", "Préparer le rapport annuel pour les parties prenantes"),
    ]

    for i, (num, text) in enumerate(steps):
        y = Inches(1.2 + i * 1.3)
        # Number circle
        num_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(0.8), y + Inches(0.15), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.6))
        num_shape.fill.solid()
        num_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = TEAL_PRIMARY
        num_shape.line.fill.background()
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), y + Inches(0.2), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5),
                     num, font_size=16, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        # Description card
        add_card(slide, Inches(1.7), y, Inches(7.5), Inches(0.9), body_text=text)

    add_footer(slide, 7)


def slide_conclusion(prs):
    """Slide 8 — Conclusion and contact."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    # Teal accent block at top
    accent = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), Inches(10.0), Inches(2.5))
    accent.fill.solid()
    accent.fill.fore_color.rgb = TEAL_DARK
    accent.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.6), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.0),
                 "Conclusion", font_size=34, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Main content card
    add_card(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(7.0), Inches(3.0),
             title_text="Résumé des résultats", body_text=(
                 "Les données cliniques confirment un profil de sécurité favorable\n"
                 "et une efficacité prometteuse du composé CT-2025-A.\n\n"
                 "Le taux de réponse global atteint 71 % à 6 mois,\n"
                 "avec aucun événement indésirable grave inattendu signalé."
             ))

    # Contact info card
    add_card(slide, Inches(3.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(4.0), Inches(1.2),
             title_text="Contact", body_text="Dr. Marie Dupont\nmarie.dupont@recherche-clinique.fr")

    add_footer(slide, 8)


# ── Main ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_title(prs)
    slide_overview(prs)
    slide_enrollment(prs)
    slide_safety(prs)
    slide_efficacy(prs)
    slide_timeline(prs)
    slide_next_steps(prs)
    slide_conclusion(prs)

    prs.save(OUTPUT_FILE)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
